text.tspan: 图4.针对申请人的少标注-多源工况感知的加工过程监测与质量控制的代表性第三方评价
Chairman of the VDI Technical Committee on EDM
Director of the Fraunhofer Institute for Production Technology IPT
The WZL Machine Tool Laboratory, RWTH Aachen University
The applicant's work underscores the critical importance
of manufacturing conditions, such as machining parameters,
The applicant's hybrid neural network model for condition perception exhibits
high predictive accuracy, reducing the workpiece profile prediction error
in the pulse ECM process to an MSE of 7.60,
which significantly enhances machining precision and reduces the costs associated
Dean of the College of Engineering, Bharati Vidyapeeth Deemed University, Pune
